detail: Sprint kickoff: requirements, contracts, and work items created for all 5 child repos
Dispatching batch: infra, api, agent, web, waf — all greenfield scaffolding
Inspecting repo index before child repo read for Entra setup script task
Reading current Terraform Entra config and existing shell scripts for setup-entra implementation
Created local idempotent Entra setup script in harness/scripts and validated bash syntax
Dispatching 5 child agents for deployment updates: infra, web, api, agent, waf
All 5 child repos processed: infra (TF fixes + AVM + split), web/api/agent (SHA-named CD), waf (in-place CD). Full deployment-updates requirement complete.
Implemented real Foundry client, validated, committed, moved todo to ready-for-review
word-game-agent real Foundry client implemented, critic PASS recorded, commit 2c76c3d verified
Root cause: Cosmos DB private DNS zone missing. Both /api/categories/config and /api/users/active return 500 because API resolves Cosmos FQDN to public IP, blocked by firewall.
Fixed both 500 bugs (Cosmos DNS zone + NSG rule). Created e2e test infra (script, skill, agent, preflight). Deployed and verified via curl. MCP child-agent-runner used for specialist+critic loop.

Diagnosed 5 game-flow bugs: server WS event/payload shapes diverge from web client; Dashboard missing game_started nav; GameScreen no reload hydration; game_ended payload lacks winners/scores; clue-giver word never sent; role/category not shown.
Dispatch game-flow bugfixes: word-game-api(008) + word-game-web(007), phase=full, max_parallel=4, timeout=1800
5 game-flow bugs fixed (api+web via phase=full), contracts updated, preflight 7/7, deployed api+web (tag ad6e5d0), e2e 13/13 PASS.
Dispatch api(009)+web(008): register 422-vs-409 name validation fix
